title: Re:Mob Control Wands
body:
### This mod is an unofficial remake of Mob Control Wands
The original MOD removed all attack targets and actions of the AI, now the mod only hijacks attack targets and actions, allowing the AI to determine whether to execute an attack based on the camp relationship

Compatible with most mods, the original monster attack action basically does not change

Spells that summon ai are cleared unconditionally, as the summoned monsters attack the player
